Property.name: modulationDestinationsPrefixOrder
Property.value: A:OP1 Env;A:OP1 ;A:OP2 Env;A:OP2 ;A:OP3 Env;A:OP3 ;A:OP4 Env;A:OP4 ;A:OP5 Env;A:OP5 ;A:OP6 Env;A:OP6 ;A:Pch ;A:LFO ;A:PitchEnv ;A:OP1Ext ;A:OP2Ext ;A:OP3Ext ;A:OP4Ext ;A:OP5Ext ;A:OP6Ext ;B:OP1 Env;B:OP1 ;B:OP2 Env;B:OP2 ;B:OP3 Env;B:OP3 ;B:OP4 Env;B:OP4 ;B:OP5 Env;B:OP5 ;B:OP6 Env;B:OP6 ;B:Pch ;B:LFO ;B:PitchEnv ;B:OP1Ext ;B:OP2Ext ;B:OP3Ext ;B:OP4Ext ;B:OP5Ext ;B:OP6Ext ;Step0 ;Step1 ;Step2 ;Step3 ;Step4 ;Step5 ;Step6 ;Step7 ;Step8 ;Step9 ;Step10 ;Step11 ;Step12 ;Step13 ;Step14

Property.name: modulationDestinationsPrefixTitles
Property.value: A:OP6 =A:Operator 6;A:OP6 Env=A:Operator 6:EG;A:OP5 =A:Operator 5;A:OP5 Env=A:Operator 5:EG;A:OP4 =A:Operator 4;A:OP4 Env=A:Operator 4:EG;A:OP3 =A:Operator 3;A:OP3 Env=A:Operator 3:EG;A:OP2 =A:Operator 2;A:OP2 Env=A:Operator 2:EG;A:OP1 =A:Operator 1;A:OP1 Env=A:Operator 1:EG;A:Pch =A:Patch;A:LFO =A:LFO;A:PitchEnv =A:PitchEnv;A:OP6Ext =A:Operator 6:Extended;A:OP5Ext =A:Operator 5:Extended;A:OP4Ext =A:Operator 4:Extended;A:OP3Ext =A:Operator 3:Extended;A:OP2Ext =A:Operator 2:Extended;A:OP1Ext =A:Operator 1:Extended;B:OP6 =B:Operator 6;B:OP6 Env=B:Operator 6:EG;B:OP5 =B:Operator 5;B:OP5 Env=B:Operator 5:EG;B:OP4 =B:Operator 4;B:OP4 Env=B:Operator 4:EG;B:OP3 =B:Operator 3;B:OP3 Env=B:Operator 3:EG;B:OP2 =B:Operator 2;B:OP2 Env=B:Operator 2:EG;B:OP1 =B:Operator 1;B:OP1 Env=B:Operator 1:EG;B:Pch =B:Patch;B:LFO =B:LFO;B:PitchEnv =B:PitchEnv;B:OP6Ext =B:Operator 6:Extended;B:OP5Ext =B:Operator 5:Extended;B:OP4Ext =B:Operator 4:Extended;B:OP3Ext =B:Operator 3:Extended;B:OP2Ext =B:Operator 2:Extended;B:OP1Ext =B:Operator 1:Extended;Step0 =Steps:Step 1;Step1 =Steps:Step 2;Step2 =Steps:Step 3;Step3 =Steps:Step 4;Step4 =Steps:Step 5;Step5 =Steps:Step 6;Step6 =Steps:Step 7;Step7 =Steps:Step 8;Step8 =Steps:Step 9;Step9 =Steps:Step 10;Step10 =Steps:Step 11;Step11 =Steps:Step 12;Step12 =Steps:Step 13;Step13 =Steps:Step 14;Step14 =Steps:Step 15
